title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 375.1427 - Effective and implementation dates
text:
375.1427.  Effective and implementation dates. — Sections 375.1400 to 375.1427 shall take effect on January 1, 2026.  Licensees shall have until January 1, 2027, to implement section 375.1405 and until January 1, 2028, to implement subsection 6 of section 375.1405.
(L. 2025 H.B. 974, et al.) 
Effective 1-01-26
